_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of Mosaicism and Detection of Cryptic Alleles in CRISPR/Cas9-Engineered Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and

_contextSnippet: Indeed, the founder pig (G3197) that had higher abundance of the E19* allele in somatic tissue resulted in a higher rate of germline transmitted F1 piglets (logistic regression, p<0.005).
details: Demonstrated mosaicism in founders with correlation between somatic tissue allele abundance and germline transmission rates (p<0.005 for E19* model, p<0.05 for 23kb excision model)
